universe.selectionMethod: Apply a CMC market-regime gate, then rank the maintained bStocks allowlist by 24h relative strength and keep only the more active names.

regime.label: risk-off-wait-for-coverage
regime.summary: The regime gate or universe coverage is too weak, so the skill should return a valid but inactive strategy specification.

entryRules.description: Only activate the bStocks rotation lane when total crypto market cap is flat-to-up versus the prior 24h snapshot.
Require CoinMarketCap Fear and Greed to stay above the defensive floor before allocating to bStocks rotation.
Keep the bStocks lane inactive when BNB is losing 24h momentum, because the venue and routing still sit on BNB Chain.
Only propose live entries when at least three tracked bStocks symbols have current CMC quotes.
Only enter symbols that rank inside the top two 24h performers of the tracked bStocks universe.
Require the selected symbol to keep a non-negative 24h return so the lane behaves as a continuation strategy, not a mean-reversion catch.
Require 24h quoted volume to remain at or above the current bStocks universe median so the strategy stays in the more active names.
Restrict the lane to the repo-maintained bStocks allowlist so the submission story stays explicit and reproducible.

exitRules.description: Exit when drawdown from entry reaches the hard stop threshold.
Harvest gains when the rotation move reaches the take-profit threshold.
Exit after three days if the relative-strength move has not resolved.
Exit if the position falls out of the top three 24h performers on the next hourly rebalance.
Flatten exposure if the regime flips defensive after entry.

riskControls.description: Cap each bStocks position at 1.0% of strategy equity.
Cap concurrent bStocks exposure at 2.0% of strategy equity.
Pause new entries after 2.0% daily strategy drawdown.
Reject symbols that fall outside the committed bStocks universe file even if CMC can quote them.
Wait twelve hours after a stop-out before re-entering the same bStocks symbol.

invalidation.description: Invalidate the lane if fewer than three tracked bStocks symbols are currently quoteable from CoinMarketCap.
Invalidate the lane if Fear and Greed drops below the activation floor.
Invalidate the lane if total crypto market cap turns negative again on a 24h basis.

assumptions.description: CoinMarketCap quote snapshots are treated as the authoritative hourly pricing reference for this repo lane.
assumptions.impact: Backtests should sample CMC-aligned hourly snapshots rather than assume continuous fills.

assumptions.description: The bStocks trade universe is an explicit repo-maintained allowlist rather than an open-ended crawler.
assumptions.impact: Backtests should use the same committed universe file for reproducibility.

assumptions.description: The bStocks lane is intentionally separate from Four.Meme discovery logic and does not inherit meme-token heuristics.
assumptions.impact: Do not blend Four.Meme bucket logic into bStocks results when evaluating this strategy family.

assumptions.description: bStocks is a newly launched venue lane, so historical inference should stay conservative and data-source timestamps must be preserved.
assumptions.impact: Backtests may need a shorter lookback window and should state any proxy assumptions explicitly.

assumptions.description: The bStocks strategy spec is reviewed by a lane-specific global learning policy before validation.
assumptions.impact: Backtests should treat the brain review verdict as an activation gate, not as an execution instruction.

evidence.summary: Total crypto market cap is 2230000000000 USD with a 24h change of -2.10%.
Fear and Greed is 23 and classified as Fear.
BNB trades at 607.75 USD with -1.03% 24h change.

Tracked 6 bStocks symbols from the committed allowlist. Leading names: SPCXB (40217) 24h 2.86%, 7d 29.63%, price $207.42, volume $58.67M; TSLAB (40214) 24h -1.03%, 7d 2.09%, price $401.51, volume $2.66M; NVDAB (40215) 24h -1.22%, 7d 2.76%, price $208.61, volume $1.05M.
Applied 3 learned lesson(s) through multi-agent review.

rationale: CMC conditions do not justify activating fresh bStocks rotation exposure yet. The current CMC snapshot shows Fear and Greed at 23, total market cap change at -2.10% over 24h, and BNB at -1.03% over 24h. The bStocks lane currently tracks 6 quoteable symbols from the committed allowlist, with SPCXB (2.86%), TSLAB (-1.03%), NVDAB (-1.22%) leading the 24h relative-strength table. This lane is intentionally shallow for the current milestone: it proves repo structure, CMC-backed pricing, and explicit backtestable rules without mixing in Four.Meme heuristics. Brain review: Safety kept the strategy inactive because the broader market regime remains below the bStocks activation floor.

rejectionReasons.description: Total crypto market cap is -2.10% over 24h, below the flat-to-up gate.
CMC Fear and Greed is 23, below the bStocks activation threshold of 45.
BNB 24h performance is -1.03%, below the non-negative venue-support gate.
Brain review returned wait: Safety kept the strategy inactive because the broader market regime remains below the bStocks activation floor.

strategyThesis: Use CMC market regime as the first gate, then rank the committed bStocks allowlist by 24h relative strength and active quoted volume. Current Fear and Greed is 23, BNB 24h is -1.03%, and the tracked universe has 6 quoteable symbols. Current leaders are SPCXB (2.86%), TSLAB (-1.03%), NVDAB (-1.22%). The deterministic draft status is rejected under regime risk-off-wait-for-coverage. The multi-agent brain keeps this strategy inactive for now: Safety kept the strategy inactive because the broader market regime remains below the bStocks activation floor.

learning.summary: Never approve a bStocks setup without matching issuer, venue, symbol, and CMC identity. Broad CMC regime gates must stay visible before any bStocks relative-strength logic is allowed to activate. Do not activate a rotation lane unless the tracked bStocks universe has enough quoteable names to rank.

agents.summary: Safety kept the strategy inactive because the broader market regime remains below the bStocks activation floor.
reasons: CMC Fear and Greed is 23, below the activation threshold of 45.
Weak regime conditions should not be overridden by single-name strength in the bStocks lane.
